question: 'India' desh mein maujood unique state names ki list banao aur unhe 'Andhra Pradesh' state ke andar mile unique district names ki list ke saath combine kar do.
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_COUNTRY AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID WHERE T2.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' UNION SELECT DISTINCT T3.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T4 ON T3.STATE_ID = T4.STATE_ID WHERE T4.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh';

question: Chittoor district mein sthit sub-district names aur ULB/RLB village names dikhaiye, lekin un sub-districts ko chhodkar jo Prakasam district mein bhi paaye jaate hain. Inhe sub-district aur village name ke hisaab se group karein aur sub-district ke naam se alphabetical order mein arrange karein.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Chittoor' AND T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME NOT IN (SELECT T4.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T4 ON T3.DISTRICT_ID = T4.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T3.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Prakasam') GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: State names aur har state ke district IDs ka total count list karo, districts ke count ke hisaab se descending order mein order karke, aur sirf top 5 results dikhao.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T2.DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T2.DISTRICT_ID) DESC LIMIT 5

question: Country name, state name, aur district name dikha do jahan district ka naam 'Chittoor' hai. Ensure karo ki in entries ke liye kam se kam ek country record ho. Results ko alphabetically order karo pehle state name se, phir country name se.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.COUNTRY_NAME, T2.STATE_NAME, T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID INNER JOIN DIM_COUNTRY AS T3 ON T2.COUNTRY_ID = T3.COUNTRY_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Chittoor' GROUP BY T3.COUNTRY_NAME, T2.STATE_NAME, T1.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.COUNTRY_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T2.STATE_NAME ASC, T3.COUNTRY_NAME ASC

question: State name, district name, aur ULB/RLB village name list karo, state, district, aur village name ke hisaab se group karke, aur village name ke alphabetical order mein arrange karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID GROUP BY T3.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME;

question: Har state ka naam aur usse jude district IDs ki total count list karo, sabse zyada districts se sabse kam districts tak order mein.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T2.DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T2.DISTRICT_ID) DESC

question: Sabhi entries ke liye district ka naam, state ka naam, aur country ka naam list karo, jise district ke naam ke hisaab se alphabetically order mein arrange karna hai.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, T2.STATE_NAME, T3.COUNTRY_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_COUNTRY AS T3 ON T2.COUNTRY_ID = T3.COUNTRY_ID ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME

question: Assam, Andhra Pradesh, ya Bihar states mein jo locations hain, unke liye state name, district name, aur ULB/RLB village name dikha do. Prakasam district ko exclude kar do. State, district, aur village name ke hisaab se group karo, aur phir village aur district ke alphabetical order mein arrange karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T3.STATE_NAME IN ('Assam', 'Andhra Pradesh', 'Bihar') AND T2.DISTRICT_NAME NOT IN ('Prakasam') GROUP BY T3.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ASC, T2.DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: India naam ke country ke liye, har state ka naam aur us state mein total districts ki count list karo. Sirf un states ko include karo jin mein kam se kam ek district ho, aur results ko district count ke highest se lowest order mein arrange karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T3.DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T1.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' GROUP BY T2.STATE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.DISTRICT_ID) > 0 ORDER BY COUNT(T3.DISTRICT_ID) DESC;

question: Sabhi locations ke liye state name, country ID, district name, aur ULB/RLB village name list karo, jise pehle village name ke hisaab se phir district name ke hisaab se order karna hai.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.STATE_NAME, T3.COUNTRY_ID, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID ORDER BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME

question: Andhra Pradesh state aur Chittoor district mein sthit ULB RLB village ke naam dikhaiye, jo village name ke hisaab se alphabetically group aur order kiye gaye hon.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID INNER JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' AND T2.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Chittoor' GROUP BY T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ASC

question: Sub-district ke naam list karo, alphabetically order mein, jismein kam se kam ek sector 'Rural' category ka ho aur kam se kam ek sector 'Urban' category ka ho.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_SECTOR_CATEGORY AS T3 ON T2.SECTOR_ID = T3.SECTOR_ID GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY = 'Rural' THEN T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY END) > 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY = 'Urban' THEN T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY END) > 0 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: India ke liye har state ka naam aur unke district IDs ka total count list karo, sirf un states ko include karo jinke districts zero se zyada hain, aur top 5 states ko dikhao jinke districts ki sankhya sabse zyada hai.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T3.DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T1.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' GROUP BY T2.STATE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.DISTRICT_ID) > 0 ORDER BY COUNT(T3.DISTRICT_ID) DESC LIMIT 5

question: Sabse recent time period ke liye, un sector categories ki list banao jahan total number of establishments 50,000 se zyada hai, specifically un records ke liye jahan residential ya commercial status 0.000 hai, aur results ko total number of establishments ke hisaab se descending order mein arrange karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.SECTOR_CATEGORY FROM FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T1 JOIN DIM_SECTOR_CATEGORY AS T2 ON T1.SECTOR_ID = T2.SECTOR_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T1.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.TIME_ID = (SELECT MAX(TIME_ID) FROM DIM_TIME) AND T1.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL = 0.000 GROUP BY T2.SECTOR_CATEGORY HAVING SUM(T1.TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS) > 50000 ORDER BY SUM(T1.TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS) DESC

question: ULB, RLB ya villages ke naam list karo, alphabetically sort karo, jinke total sum of livestock establishments zero se zyada ho, specifically un locations ke liye filter karo jahan individual livestock establishment counts zero se zyada ho aur residential-commercial establishments ka count exactly zero ho.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T3 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T3.LOCATION_ID WHERE T2.EST_LIVESTOCK > 0.000 AND T3.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL = 0.000 GROUP BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.EST_LIVESTOCK) > 0.000 ORDER BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ASC

question: Bihar state ke liye, har district ka naam aur distinct ULB/RLB village names ki total count list karo, sirf un districts ko include karo jahan villages ki count zero se zyada ho, aur top 10 districts with highest counts dikhao.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(DISTINCT T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Bihar' GROUP BY T2.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME) > 0 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME) DESC LIMIT 10

question: Census year 2013 ke liye, un sector categories ki list banao jahan total establishments ki sankhya 50,000 se zyada ho, specifically un records ko filter karo jahan residential ya commercial status 0.000 ho, aur resulting sector categories ko descending order mein sort karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.SECTOR_CATEGORY FROM FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T1 JOIN DIM_SECTOR_CATEGORY AS T2 ON T1.SECTOR_ID = T2.SECTOR_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T1.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' AND T1.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL = 0.000 GROUP BY T2.SECTOR_CATEGORY HAVING SUM(T1.TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS) > 50000 ORDER BY T2.SECTOR_CATEGORY DESC

question: Census year 2013 ke liye, sub-district names aur ULB/RLB village names ki list banao jahan fishing aur aquaculture establishments ki sankhya 0 se zyada ya barabar ho aur residential commercial establishments ki sankhya bhi 0 se zyada ya barabar ho. Yeh ensure karo ki sirf woh locations include ho jinke establishment totals mein kam se kam ek record ho. Results ko sub-district name ke hisaab se alphabetically arrange karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T3 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T3.LOCATION_ID AND T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T4 ON T2.TIME_ID = T4.TIME_ID WHERE T3.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE >= 0.000 AND T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL >= 0.000 AND T4.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T2.FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: Census year 2013 ke liye, un locations ke sub-district names aur ULB/RLB village names list karo jahan estimated livestock count zero se zyada hai, lekin un locations ko exclude karo jinka estimated residential-commercial count bhi 2013 mein zero se zyada tha. Inhe unke sub-district aur village names ke hisaab se group karo aur sub-district ke anusaar alphabetically order mein arrange karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' AND T2.EST_LIVESTOCK > 0.000 AND T1.LOCATION_ID NOT IN ( SELECT T4.LOCATION_ID FROM FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T4 JOIN DIM_TIME AS T5 ON T4.TIME_ID = T5.TIME_ID WHERE T5.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' AND T4.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL > 0.000 ) GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T2.FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: Sub-district names ki list banao census year 2013 ke liye jahan total establishments zero se zyada ho aur residential-commercial establishments ki count exactly zero ho.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS) > 0.000 AND SUM(T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL) = 0.000

question: 'Andhra Pradesh' ya 'Assam' states mein jitne bhi districts hain, un sabke state name aur district name dikha do, aur results ko state name ke hisaab se sort karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' OR T1.STATE_NAME = 'Assam' ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME

question: For the most recent census year available, list each sub-district name and the total sum of estimated residential commercial establishments, filtering for records where the estimated residential commercial value is 0.000, and order the results by the sum in descending order.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL) FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(CENSUS_YEAR) FROM DIM_TIME) AND T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL = 0.000 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL) DESC

question: Census year 2013 ke liye, sub-district naam list karo, alphabetical order mein, jahan ya toh residential commercial establishment total 0 se zyada hai ya ULB RLB village naam 'Pilpilow' hai.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' AND (T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL > 0.000 OR T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME = 'Pilpilow') GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: Census year 2013 ke liye, sub-district names aur estimated residential aur commercial establishments ka total sum list karo, jismein sabse zyada totals wale top 10 sub-districts dikhayein.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL) FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL) DESC LIMIT 10

question: Sabse recent census year ke liye, har sub-district ka naam aur manufacturing aur construction establishments ka total sum list karo, sirf un sub-districts ko include karte hue jahan yeh combined sum zero se zyada hai, aur results ko total sum ke hisaab se descending order mein arrange karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING + T2.EST_CONSTRUCTION) FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(CENSUS_YEAR) FROM DIM_TIME) GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING + T2.EST_CONSTRUCTION) > 0.000 ORDER BY SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING + T2.EST_CONSTRUCTION) DESC

question: Census year '2013' ke liye un sub-district names ki list banao jahan residential-commercial establishment count 0.000 ya usse zyada ho, aur yeh sub-districts usi year ke liye same criteria meet karne wale sub-districts ke set mein bhi hon. Results ko sub-district name ke hisaab se ascending order mein dikhao.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL >= 0.000 AND T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' AND T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME IN (SELECT T4.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T4 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T5 ON T4.LOCATION_ID = T5.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T6 ON T5.TIME_ID = T6.TIME_ID WHERE T5.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL >= 0.000 AND T6.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013') GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: ULB RLB gaon ke naam list karo, alphabetically sort karke, un locations ke liye jahan forestry and logging establishments ki sankhya zero se zyada ho ya residential and commercial establishments ki sankhya zero se zyada ho.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T3 ON T2.LOCATION_ID = T3.LOCATION_ID WHERE T3.EST_FORESTRY_LOGGING > 0.000 OR T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL > 0.000 GROUP BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ASC

question: Sub-district names ki list banao, alphabetically order mein, jinke total establishments ki sankhya zero se zyada thi lekin residential ya commercial establishments zero the 2013 census year mein.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS) > 0.000 AND SUM(T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL) = 0.000 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: Sabse recent time period ke liye, un ULB, RLB, ya villages ke naam list karo jahan total estimated manufacturing value 50 se zyada hai.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.TIME_ID = (SELECT MAX(TIME_ID) FROM DIM_TIME) GROUP BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING) > 50

question: For the most recent census year available, list each sub-district name and the total estimated manufacturing value, sorted from highest to lowest total estimated manufacturing.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING) FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(CENSUS_YEAR) FROM DIM_TIME) GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING) DESC

question: 2013 ki census ke liye, har sub-district ka naam aur unke manufacturing aur construction establishments ka sum list karo, sub-district name ke hisaab se group karke aur alphabetically order mein.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING + T2.EST_CONSTRUCTION) FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: Sabse recent time period ke liye, un ULB, RLB, ya villages ke naam list karo jinka total estimated manufacturing value 50 se zyada hai, aur inhe unke total estimated manufacturing ke descending order mein arrange karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.TIME_ID = (SELECT MAX(TIME_ID) FROM DIM_TIME) GROUP BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING) > 50 ORDER BY SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING) DESC

question: Census year 2013 ke liye, har sub-district ka naam list karo, saath mein total estimated manufacturing aur total estimated construction values ke saath, sub-district name ke hisaab se group karke aur alphabetically order karke.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING), SUM(T2.EST_CONSTRUCTION) FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: 2013 census ke liye sub-district names list karo jahan total estimated manufacturing 0 se zyada ho aur total estimated exactly 0 ho, sub-district name ke hisaab se group karke alphabetical order mein arrange karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING) > 0.000 AND SUM(T2.EST_CONSTRUCTION) = 0.000 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: Census year 2013 ke liye, har sub-district ka naam list karo saath mein total estimated manufacturing aur total estimated construction values, ensure karo ki total estimated manufacturing at least 0.000 ho, aur results ko total estimated manufacturing ke hisaab se descending order mein sort karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING), SUM(T2.EST_CONSTRUCTION) FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING) >= 0.000 ORDER BY SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING) DESC

question: Census year 2013 ke liye, un sub-district names aur ULB/RLB village names ki list banao jahan total estimated accommodation aur food expenses kam se kam 0.000 ho, aur results ko sub-district name ke hisaab se alphabetically sort karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_TRANSPORT_HOSPITALITY AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.EST_ACCOMMODATION_FOOD) >= 0.000 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: 2013 census year ke sub-district names list karo jinke total estimated transport and storage value zero se zyada ho, lekin un sub-districts ko exclude karo jinke estimated accommodation and food value bhi usi year mein zero se zyada ho. Results ko sub-district name ke hisaab se alphabetical order mein arrange karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_TRANSPORT_HOSPITALITY AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.EST_TRANSPORT_STORAGE) > 0.000 AND T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME NOT IN (SELECT T4.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T4 JOIN FACT_TRANSPORT_HOSPITALITY AS T5 ON T4.LOCATION_ID = T5.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T6 ON T5.TIME_ID = T6.TIME_ID WHERE T6.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' AND T5.EST_ACCOMMODATION_FOOD > 0.000) ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: Census year 2013 ke liye, har sub-district ka naam list karo, saath mein total estimated transport and storage costs aur total estimated accommodation and food costs. Sub-district name ke hisaab se group karo aur alphabetical order mein arrange karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.EST_TRANSPORT_STORAGE), SUM(T2.EST_ACCOMMODATION_FOOD) FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_TRANSPORT_HOSPITALITY AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: Census year 2013 ke liye, un top 10 sub-districts ki list banao jinke total estimated accommodation aur food costs sabse zyada hain. Un sub-districts ke names aur unke total costs dikhao.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.EST_ACCOMMODATION_FOOD) FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_TRANSPORT_HOSPITALITY AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.EST_ACCOMMODATION_FOOD) DESC LIMIT 10

question: Census year '2013' ke liye un sub-district names dikhao jahan ya toh total_estimated_manufacturing 500 se zyada ho ya phir total_estimated_construction 200 se zyada ho, aur results ko sub-district name ke hisaab se alphabetically order karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING) > 500 UNION SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.EST_CONSTRUCTION) > 200 ORDER BY SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: Har sub-district aur census year ke liye, sub-district name aur census year ke saath, estimated education aur estimated human health and social values ka total sum list karo, jahan woh sum kam se kam 0.000 ho. Results ko census year aur total sum ke hisaab se descending order mein arrange karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.CENSUS_YEAR, SUM(T3.EST_EDUCATION + T3.EST_HUMAN_HEALTH_SOCIAL) FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_EDUCATION_HEALTH AS T3 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T3.LOCATION_ID INNER JOIN DIM_TIME AS T2 ON T3.TIME_ID = T2.TIME_ID GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.CENSUS_YEAR HAVING SUM(T3.EST_EDUCATION + T3.EST_HUMAN_HEALTH_SOCIAL) >= 0.000 ORDER BY T2.CENSUS_YEAR DESC, SUM(T3.EST_EDUCATION + T3.EST_HUMAN_HEALTH_SOCIAL) DESC

question: Har state ka naam aur usse judi location IDs ki ginti list karo, state name ke hisaab se group karke aur ginti ke hisaab se zyada se kam order mein arrange karo.

FROM DIM_STATE s
JOIN DIM_DISTRICT d ON s.STATE_ID = d.STATE_ID
JOIN DIM_LOCATION l ON d.DISTRICT_ID = l.DISTRICT_ID
GROUP BY s.STATE_NAME
ORDER BY location_count DESC;

question: Sub-district naam aur census year dikhaiye, saath hi total establishments ka sum aur residential-commercial establishments ka sum, dono sub-district aur census year ke hisaab se group karke, aur census year ke chronological order mein arrange karein.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.CENSUS_YEAR, SUM(T1.TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS), SUM(T1.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL) FROM FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T1 JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T1.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.CENSUS_YEAR ORDER BY T3.CENSUS_YEAR ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    l.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME,
    t.CENSUS_YEAR,
    SUM(fet.TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS) AS total_establishments,
    SUM(fet.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL) AS residential_commercial
FROM 
    DIM_LOCATION l
JOIN 
    FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS fet ON l.LOCATION_ID = fet.LOCATION_ID
JOIN 
    DIM_TIME t ON fet.TIME_ID = t.TIME_ID
GROUP BY 
    l.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, t.CENSUS_YEAR
ORDER BY 
    t.CENSUS_YEAR;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    l.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME,
    t.CENSUS_YEAR,
    SUM(fet.TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS) AS total_establishments,
    SUM(fet.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL) AS residential_commercial
FROM 
    DIM_LOCATION l
JOIN 
    FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS fet ON l.LOCATION_ID = fet.LOCATION_ID
JOIN 
    DIM_TIME t ON fet.TIME_ID = t.TIME_ID
GROUP BY 
    l.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, t.CENSUS_YEAR
ORDER BY 
    t.CENSUS_YEAR;

question: Andhra Pradesh ke liye, district names aur distinct ULB/RLB village names ki count list karo, district name ke hisaab se group karke, sabse zyada villages wale order mein, aur sirf top 10 results dikhao.

question: Census year aur har saal ka total estimated fishing aquaculture dikhaiye, yeh ensure karte hue ki total kam se kam 0.000 ho, aur results ko total estimated fishing aquaculture ke hisaab se descending order mein order karein.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.CENSUS_YEAR, SUM(T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) FROM FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_TIME AS T2 ON T1.TIME_ID = T2.TIME_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T3 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T3.LOCATION_ID GROUP BY T2.CENSUS_YEAR HAVING SUM(T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) >= 0.000 ORDER BY SUM(T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    t.CENSUS_YEAR,
    COALESCE(SUM(fp.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE), 0.000) AS total_fishing_aquaculture
FROM 
    FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR fp
JOIN 
    DIM_TIME t ON fp.TIME_ID = t.TIME_ID
GROUP BY 
    t.CENSUS_YEAR
ORDER BY 
    total_fishing_aquaculture DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    t.CENSUS_YEAR,
    COALESCE(SUM(fp.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE), 0.000) AS total_fishing_aquaculture
FROM 
    FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR fp
JOIN 
    DIM_TIME t ON fp.TIME_ID = t.TIME_ID
GROUP BY 
    t.CENSUS_YEAR
ORDER BY
